reference_answer: The clinic provided the covers so visitors could cross the wet floor safely and conveniently without waiting for staff to dry their shoes.
The guide seems inventive and repair-minded.
The river path was dangerous or unsafe after dark.
The children cleaned up the spill by wiping the forms and table with towels.
The portable light helped residents avoid tripping or stepping over the broken threshold in the dark.
The organizer checked the coats so damaged coats could be marked for repair before pickup.
